summary: Results-driven digital marketing leader with 10 years of experience across global agencies and in-house roles. Deep expertise in performance marketing, paid media strategy, and marketing analytics. Proven ability to build and scale high-performing teams, manage eight-figure budgets, and drive measurable commercial outcomes. MBA from Cambridge Judge Business School.
skills: Performance Marketing (SEM, Paid Social, Programmatic), Marketing Analytics & Attribution Modelling, SEO Strategy & Content Marketing, Team Leadership & Stakeholder Management, Budget Planning & P&L Management, A/B Testing & CRO, Tools: GA4, Salesforce, Tableau, Looker
certifications: Google Ads Certified (Search, Display, Video), Meta Blueprint Certified, HubSpot Marketing Certified

experience.title: Head of Digital Marketing — EMEA
experience.description: Lead a cross-functional team of 18 marketers across 12 EMEA markets, managing a £22M annual budget. Launched brand awareness campaign achieving 340M impressions and a 14-point brand recall lift in core markets. Spearheaded adoption of Privacy Sandbox APIs across the EMEA marketing stack ahead of third-party cookie deprecation. Reduced customer acquisition cost by 28% through algorithmic bidding strategy redesign using Google's Performance Max. Grew EMEA organic search traffic by 47% YoY through structured SEO roadmap and content strategy overhaul.

experience.title: Associate Director, Performance Marketing
experience.description: Managed paid search, display, and social campaigns for clients including HSBC, Unilever, and British Airways. Delivered £180M in combined tracked revenue across client portfolio in FY 2020. Built and managed a team of 9 performance specialists; introduced structured OKR framework reducing onboarding time by 40%. Developed proprietary attribution model adopted agency-wide, replacing last-click default for 22 client accounts.

experience.title: Senior Digital Marketing Manager
experience.description: Planned and executed integrated digital campaigns across SEM, programmatic display, and social for retail and FMCG clients. Achieved average ROAS of 5.4x across managed accounts, exceeding agency benchmarks by 30%. Mentored 4 junior executives; two were promoted to manager within 18 months.

experience.title: Digital Marketing Executive
experience.description: Executed Google Ads and Facebook campaigns for luxury retail clients; managed combined monthly spend of £600K. Produced weekly performance dashboards and executive-level reporting for six client accounts.

education.institution: Cambridge Judge Business School, University of Cambridge
